caption: A video game depicts an American football game played on a green grass field with white yard lines and a large red and yellow end zone. Players in white uniforms and players in black uniforms are scattered across the field. In the foreground, a quarterback in a black uniform, labeled "Bledsoe," stands behind his offensive line. Opposing players in white uniforms attempt to tackle him. A player labeled "Smith" moves across the field during the play. In the bottom left of the footage, a webcam overlay shows a fair-skinned man with blond hair wearing a dark blue shirt, sitting in front of a decorated Christmas tree. As the sequence progresses, the players move dynamically; the quarterback drops back and prepares to throw, while defenders close in on him. The labels "Smith" and "Bledsoe" remain visible over the respective players throughout the action.
